# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /Users/rtorr/personal/sea-packages/packages/folly/2024.11.0/_fbuild
# It was generated by CMake: /Applications/CMake.app/Contents/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//The subdirectory where binaries should be installed
BIN_INSTALL_DIR:STRING=bin

//Whether to link against boost statically or dynamically.
BOOST_LINK_STATIC:STRING=auto

//If enabled, compile the benchmarks.
BUILD_BENCHMARKS:BOOL=OFF

//If enabled, compile tests that are known to be broken.
BUILD_BROKEN_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//If enabled, compile tests that are known to hang.
BUILD_HANGING_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//If enabled, build folly as a shared library.    This is generally
// discouraged, since folly does not commit to having   a stable
// ABI.
BUILD_SHARED_LIBS:BOOL=ON

//If enabled, compile tests that take a while to run in debug mode.
BUILD_SLOW_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//If enabled, compile the tests.
BUILD_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a file.
BZIP2_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.1.sdk/usr/include

//Path to a library.
BZIP2_LIBRARY_DEBUG:FILEPATH=BZIP2_LIBRARY_DEBUG-NOTFOUND

//Library providing backtrace(3), empty for default set of libraries

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during all build types.

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.

// MinSizeRel ...

_OPENSSL_LDFLAGS_OTHER:INTERNAL=
_OPENSSL_LIBDIR:INTERNAL=/opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib
_OPENSSL_LIBRARIES:INTERNAL=ssl;crypto
_OPENSSL_LIBRARY_DIRS:INTERNAL=/opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib
_OPENSSL_LIBS:INTERNAL=
_OPENSSL_LIBS_L:INTERNAL=
_OPENSSL_LIBS_OTHER:INTERNAL=
_OPENSSL_LIBS_PATHS:INTERNAL=

_OPENSSL_PREFIX:INTERNAL=/opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1

_OPENSSL_STATIC_CFLAGS_I:INTERNAL=
_OPENSSL_STATIC_CFLAGS_OTHER:INTERNAL=
_OPENSSL_STATIC_INCLUDE_DIRS:INTERNAL=/opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/include

_OPENSSL_STATIC_LDFLAGS_OTHER:INTERNAL=
_OPENSSL_STATIC_LIBDIR:INTERNAL=
_OPENSSL_STATIC_LIBRARIES:INTERNAL=ssl;crypto
_OPENSSL_STATIC_LIBRARY_DIRS:INTERNAL=/opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib
_OPENSSL_STATIC_LIBS:INTERNAL=
_OPENSSL_STATIC_LIBS_L:INTERNAL=
_OPENSSL_STATIC_LIBS_OTHER:INTERNAL=
_OPENSSL_STATIC_LIBS_PATHS:INTERNAL=
_OPENSSL_VERSION:INTERNAL=3.6.1
_OPENSSL_openssl_INCLUDEDIR:INTERNAL=
_OPENSSL_openssl_LIBDIR:INTERNAL=
_OPENSSL_openssl_PREFIX:INTERNAL=
_OPENSSL_openssl_VERSION:INTERNAL=
__pkg_config_arguments__OPENSSL:INTERNAL=QUIET;openssl
__pkg_config_checked__OPENSSL:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: boost_atomic_DIR
boost_atomic_DIR-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
